title: Module 4: Loops & Arrays
description: Kaam ko repeat karna aur data ki list banana.

chapters.title: 1. Loops (Chakkar)
chapters.content:
Agar aapko 100 baar 'Hello' bolna ho, to kya aap 100 baar likhenge? Nahi! Hum Loops use karte hain.

  • For Loop: Jab pata ho kitni baar chalana hai.
  • While Loop: Jab tak shart poori na ho tab tak chalao.

chapters.title: 2. Arrays (Lists)
chapters.content:
Variables me ek value aati hai. Arrays me hum bohot saari values rakh sakte hain.

Example: let fruits = ['Apple', 'Banana', 'Mango'];

chapters.title: 3. Array Methods
chapters.content:
Arrays ke saath khelne ke tools:

  • push(): Naya item add karna.
  • pop(): Last item hatana.
  • length: Pata karna ki list kitni lambi hai.
